title: calophyllum inophyllum
intro: Calophyllum inophyllum, also known as the beauty leaf tree or tamanu tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of the Pacific and Indian Oceans. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The oil extracted from its seeds has been shown to have health benefits such as promoting wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against skin damage. Calophyllum inophyllum can be prepared into various herbal products, including oils, creams, and ointments, which are used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other health issues.
